content.text: All 12 tests pass. Now the workflow + test harness.

input.content:
name: artifact-cleanup-script

on:
  push:
  pull_request:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      max_age_days:
        description: Maximum artifact age in days (0 disables)
        required: false
        default: '30'
      max_total_size_bytes:
        description: Maximum total size budget in bytes (0 disables)
        required: false
        default: '0'
      keep_latest_per_workflow:
        description: Keep latest N artifacts per workflow run (0 disables)
        required: false
        default: '0'
      dry_run:
        description: Dry-run mode
        required: false
        default: 'true'
  schedule:
    - cron: '17 4 * * *'

permissions:
  contents: read

env:
  FIXTURE_PATH: fixtures/artifacts.json
  MAX_AGE_DAYS: '30'
  MAX_TOTAL_SIZE_BYTES: '0'
  KEEP_LATEST_PER_WORKFLOW: '0'
  DRY_RUN: 'true'

jobs:
  unit-tests:
    name: Pester unit tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Run Pester tests
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $r = Invoke-Pester -Path ./Cleanup-Artifacts.Tests.ps1 -Output Detailed -PassThru
          if ($r.FailedCount -gt 0) {
            Write-Error "Pester tests failed: $($r.FailedCount)"
            exit 1
          }

  cleanup-plan:
    name: Compute cleanup plan
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: unit-tests
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Run cleanup script against fixture
        shell: pwsh
        env:
          MAX_AGE_DAYS: ${{ github.event.inputs.max_age_days || env.MAX_AGE_DAYS }}
          MAX_TOTAL_SIZE_BYTES: ${{ github.event.inputs.max_total_size_bytes || env.MAX_TOTAL_SIZE_BYTES }}
          KEEP_LATEST_PER_WORKFLOW: ${{ github.event.inputs.keep_latest_per_workflow || env.KEEP_LATEST_PER_WORKFLOW }}
          DRY_RUN: ${{ github.event.inputs.dry_run || env.DRY_RUN }}
        run: |
          . ./Cleanup-Artifacts.ps1
          $dry = [bool]::Parse($env:DRY_RUN)
          $plan = Invoke-ArtifactCleanup `
            -InputPath $env:FIXTURE_PATH `
            -MaxAgeDays ([int]$env:MAX_AGE_DAYS) `
            -MaxTotalSizeBytes ([long]$env:MAX_TOTAL_SIZE_BYTES) `
            -KeepLatestPerWorkflow ([int]$env:KEEP_LATEST_PER_WORKFLOW) `
            -DryRun:$dry
          Write-Host "RESULT_DELETED_COUNT=$($plan.DeletedCount)"
          Write-Host "RESULT_RETAINED_COUNT=$($plan.RetainedCount)"
          Write-Host "RESULT_RECLAIMED_BYTES=$($plan.TotalReclaimedBytes)"

name: artifact-cleanup-script

on:
  push:
  pull_request:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      max_age_days:
        description: Maximum artifact age in days (0 disables)
        required: false
        default: '30'
      max_total_size_bytes:
        description: Maximum total size budget in bytes (0 disables)
        required: false
        default: '0'

        description: Keep latest N artifacts per workflow run (0 disables)
        required: false
        default: '0'
      dry_run:
        description: Dry-run mode
        required: false
        default: 'true'
  schedule:
    - cron: '17 4 * * *'

permissions:
  contents: read

env:
  FIXTURE_PATH: fixtures/artifacts.json
  MAX_AGE_DAYS: '30'
  MAX_TOTAL_SIZE_BYTES: '0'
  KEEP_LATEST_PER_WORKFLOW: '0'
  DRY_RUN: 'true'

jobs:
  unit-tests:
    name: Pester unit tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Run Pester tests
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $r = Invoke-Pester -Path ./Cleanup-Artifacts.Tests.ps1 -Output Detailed -PassThru
          if ($r.FailedCount -gt 0) {
            Write-Error "Pester tests failed: $($r.FailedCount)"
            exit 1
          }

  cleanup-plan:
    name: Compute cleanup plan
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: unit-tests
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Run cleanup script against fixture
        shell: pwsh
        env:
          MAX_AGE_DAYS: ${{ github.event.inputs.max_age_days || env.MAX_AGE_DAYS }}
          MAX_TOTAL_SIZE_BYTES: ${{ github.event.inputs.max_total_size_bytes || env.MAX_TOTAL_SIZE_BYTES }}
          KEEP_LATEST_PER_WORKFLOW: ${{ github.event.inputs.keep_latest_per_workflow || env.KEEP_LATEST_PER_WORKFLOW }}
          DRY_RUN: ${{ github.event.inputs.dry_run || env.DRY_RUN }}
        run: |
          . ./Cleanup-Artifacts.ps1
          $dry = [bool]::Parse($env:DRY_RUN)
          $plan = Invoke-ArtifactCleanup `
            -InputPath $env:FIXTURE_PATH `
            -MaxAgeDays ([int]$env:MAX_AGE_DAYS) `
            -MaxTotalSizeBytes ([long]$env:MAX_TOTAL_SIZE_BYTES) `
            -KeepLatestPerWorkflow ([int]$env:KEEP_LATEST_PER_WORKFLOW) `
            -DryRun:$dry
          Write-Host "RESULT_DELETED_COUNT=$($plan.DeletedCount)"
          Write-Host "RESULT_RETAINED_COUNT=$($plan.RetainedCount)"
          Write-Host "RESULT_RECLAIMED_BYTES=$($plan.TotalReclaimedBytes)"

content.text:
Everything is green:

- **`Cleanup-Artifacts.ps1`** — `Get-ArtifactDeletionPlan` (the three retention policies), `Format-CleanupSummary` (dry-run/execute), `Invoke-ArtifactCleanup` (JSON I/O + error handling).
- **`Cleanup-Artifacts.Tests.ps1`** — 12 Pester tests, all pass locally and inside the workflow.
- **`.github/workflows/artifact-cleanup-script.yml`** — push/pull_request/workflow_dispatch/schedule triggers, two jobs (`unit-tests` → `cleanup-plan`), `actions/checkout@v4`, `shell: pwsh`. actionlint clean.
- **`Test-Workflow.ps1`** — structure + actionlint checks, then runs `act push --rm --pull=false` once per fixture case. Three cases (age policy, keep-latest-per-workflow, size budget) each assert exit 0, ≥2 "Job succeeded", and exact `RESULT_DELETED_COUNT` / `RESULT_RETAINED_COUNT` / `RESULT_RECLAIMED_BYTES` parsed from the cleanup output.
- **`act-result.txt`** (22 KB) — full delimited act output for all 3 cases, 6 "Job succeeded" markers (2 jobs × 3 cases).

result:
Everything is green:

- **`Cleanup-Artifacts.ps1`** — `Get-ArtifactDeletionPlan` (the three retention policies), `Format-CleanupSummary` (dry-run/execute), `Invoke-ArtifactCleanup` (JSON I/O + error handling).
- **`Cleanup-Artifacts.Tests.ps1`** — 12 Pester tests, all pass locally and inside the workflow.
- **`.github/workflows/artifact-cleanup-script.yml`** — push/pull_request/workflow_dispatch/schedule triggers, two jobs (`unit-tests` → `cleanup-plan`), `actions/checkout@v4`, `shell: pwsh`. actionlint clean.
- **`Test-Workflow.ps1`** — structure + actionlint checks, then runs `act push --rm --pull=false` once per fixture case. Three cases (age policy, keep-latest-per-workflow, size budget) each assert exit 0, ≥2 "Job succeeded", and exact `RESULT_DELETED_COUNT` / `RESULT_RETAINED_COUNT` / `RESULT_RECLAIMED_BYTES` parsed from the cleanup output.
- **`act-result.txt`** (22 KB) — full delimited act output for all 3 cases, 6 "Job succeeded" markers (2 jobs × 3 cases).
